flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bowling Green State University-Main Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.1k → $14.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bowling Green State University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
